title: 數字獵人 UI 素材契約(唯一權威清單)
howItWorks: 這份檔是『所有 UI chrome 圖片』的唯一清單。每個元件有尺寸、九宮格邊界(可伸縮)、需要的狀態、以及給 AI 的生圖 prompt。流程:Codex 依 prompt 生圖 → 使用者切成透明 PNG 放到 art/<id>.<state>.png → 跑 make_kit.py → 自動產生 CSS 與佔位圖。沒有真圖時用佔位圖,畫面照樣是圖片式、可組裝。
artStyle: Cute Chunky Math Quest:厚重黑色描邊(約 6–10px)、圓角、玩具感、扁平無寫實漸層、高彩度、輕微塑膠亮面。透明背景(去背 PNG)。風格與 assets/ui-concepts/cute-chunky-math-quest-board.png 一致。

stateMeaning.hover: 滑鼠移上(桌機;手機可省略)

panel.cream.use: 彈窗/資訊面板底(開始、結算、設定、孵化…)
panel.cream.prompt: A cute chunky game UI panel, cream/parchment rounded card with thick dark outline, soft inner border, flat toy style, transparent background, 512x320, designed as a 9-slice with ~64px non-stretch corners.

panel.dark.use: 深色 HUD 條 / 頂列 / 盤面框底
panel.dark.prompt: A dark navy chunky UI bar/panel with thick black outline and subtle top highlight, flat toy style, transparent background, 512x256, 9-slice ~56px corners.

button.primary.use: 主要行動按鈕(開始、下一關、抽蛋…)
button.primary.prompt: A chunky toy game button, golden-yellow rounded pill with thick black outline and thick bottom lip (3D), small top gloss. Provide three states: normal, pressed(底部變薄、整體下移、略暗), disabled(灰階). Transparent background, 384x132 each, 9-slice corners ~44px.

button.jr.use: 幼兒模式友善按鈕(藍色)
button.jr.prompt: Same chunky toy button as button.primary but friendly sky-blue. Three states normal/pressed/disabled. Transparent, 384x132, 9-slice ~44px.

button.ghost.use: 次要按鈕(離開、取消、返回)
button.ghost.prompt: A smaller secondary chunky button, muted lavender, thick dark outline, flat. normal + pressed. Transparent, 288x104, 9-slice ~40px.

badge.pill.use: 標籤膠囊(BOSS、關卡編號、機關提示)
badge.pill.prompt: A chunky pill/label badge, bright pink rounded capsule with thick black outline, flat toy style. Transparent, 320x96, 9-slice with large ~60px left/right corners so it scales as a pill.

frame.board.use: 棋盤外框 / well(包住 canvas 盤面)
frame.board.prompt: A chunky toy game-board frame/tray, dark teal-navy with thick rounded outer rim and inner well shadow, hollow center (transparent middle), flat style. Transparent, 432x432, 9-slice ~44px rim.

spritesNote: 單張 icon(技能/獎勵/導覽)已在 assets/ui/icons/ 並有自己的 manifest.json,沿用即可;本檔只管會伸縮的 chrome(面板/按鈕/徽章/框)。
